notableEvents.label: Isaac Paredes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop J.P. Crawford to first baseman Josh Naylor. Yordan Alvarez out at 2nd. Isaac Paredes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Isaac Paredes plunked
